'''Ellis Lingard''' (born 22 October 2006) is an English professional [[rugby league]] [[footballer]] who plays as a {{rlp|pr}}, {{rlp|sr}} and {{rlp|lf}} for the [[Dewsbury Rams]] in the [[RFL Championship]], on a one-week loan from [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Super League]].

==Career==
===Wakefield Trinity===
Lingard made his debut in round 12 of the [[2025 Super League season]] for Trinity against the [[Salford Red Devils]], scoring two tries.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.com/sport/rugby-league/articles/c8x5kr2yje4o |title=Wakefield youngster Lingard signs deal until 2029 |publisher=BBC Sport |date=28 August 2025}}</ref><ref>{{citeweb|url=https://www.yorkshireeveningpost.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/wakefield-trinity-news-daryl-powells-delight-as-young-forward-signs-long-term-contract-5291395 |title=Wakefield Trinity news: Daryl Powell's delight as young forward signs long-term contract |publisher=Yorkshire Evening Post |first=Peter |last=Smith |date=27 August 2025}}</ref><ref>{{citeweb|url=https://www.superleague.co.uk/match-centre/report/43484 |title=Super League Match Report |publisher=Super League |date=25 May 2025}}</ref>

===Dewsbury Rams (loan)===
On 18 March 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[Dewsbury Rams]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on one-week loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=18 Mar 2026|author=Aaron Bower|title=Wakefield trio make Championship switch as Halifax land squad boost|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/wakefield-trinity-trio-championship-transfer}}</ref>
